vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely unsupported by the visual evidence. The pots are present, but the biological occupants are either absent, dormant, or have suffered total systemic collapse.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: Yellow pot is visible but contains no discernible plant matter.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: Black pot shows no signs of Mexican Mint.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No evidence of Silver Guest.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no String of Nickels detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no Mexican Mint detected.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; soil is bare.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dark and potentially damp, but lacks any vegetative cover.
biome_observations.debris: White particulate matter (likely perlite or mineral deposits) is visible on the soil surface of the black pot.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t1: In the earliest image, a single green sprout was visible in the black pot. By T-1, this sprout has vanished, indicating a rapid decline or removal.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: No change; the biome remains in a state of total vegetative absence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. The disappearance of the single sprout observed in the earliest image confirms a failure to establish or maintain growth under current conditions.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of the white rabbit anchor in an otherwise empty pot suggests a decorative setup that has lost its botanical component.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The sequence captures the final disappearance of the last remaining sprout, leaving the pots as empty vessels. The environment appears to be a static, non-productive desk setup.
